name: real-distance-cardio-emom-20260720
description: Real saved doc (xFlaKYyapTDH8K2wmrN2, 'Endurance Circuit'): cadenced cardio EMOM — Every 3:15 x 10 of 1000m Echo Bike + 20 Russian KB Swings + 15 Goblet Squats. The hero MUST be the distance total (10.0 KM / ECHO BIKE), never the rep tally: reps (200+150=350) exclude the Echo Bike entirely, which is the dominant work. Guards the distance hero + the format-agnostic cardio guard.

workout.title: Endurance Circuit
workout.rawText:
Every 3:15 min x 10:
1000 meters echo bike
20 Russian kettlebell swing
15 goblet squats

exercises.name: Every 3:15 min x 10
